metadata.description: Opinionated Claude Code harness packs across four curated software domains (web, data, devops, mobile), built on a shared non-negotiable safety base.

plugins.name: harness-base
plugins.description: Four non-negotiable safety hooks plus cross-cutting engineering modules as auto-loading skills. Every domain pack depends on this.

plugins.name: harness-web
plugins.description: Curated web pack: API service, design system, distributed backend, frontend app, fullstack app.

plugins.name: harness-data
plugins.description: Curated data pack: analytics engineering, analyst notebook, LLM app, ML pipeline.

plugins.name: harness-devops
plugins.description: Curated devops pack: CI/CD platform, infrastructure, Kubernetes platform, observability/SRE.

plugins.name: harness-mobile
plugins.description: Curated mobile pack: native iOS, native Android, React Native + Expo, Flutter.
